回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 跨文化溝通 (Intercultural Communication)	開課班級 : 應英一	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 吳唯邦	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
Enhance skills in English readings and writings with informative texts covering a variety of topic, along with active and meaningful discussions in class. It also helps to build up vocabulary with comprehensive questions to help identify main ideas and analyze key concepts. All in all, it aims to develop students’ reading comprehension, vocabulary skills, critical thinking, and to promote cross-cultural communication. 


2.教學綱要
To promote English abilities in all aspects; to develop students’ reading comprehension, vocabulary skills, critical thinking, and cross-cultural communication with active and meaningful discussions. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : Understanding Media and Culture　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : 　出版社 : 　版本 :  


無參考書資料。

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

5.教學進度表
週次	日期	內容	備註
1	
2023/09/10─2023/09/16
	Orientation 	 
2	
2023/09/17─2023/09/23
	Media and Culture 	The Greatest Show on Earth: P.T. Barnum and "The Swedish Nightingale" 
3	
2023/09/24─2023/09/30
	The Evolution of Media 	The Power of Printing Press: Johannes Gutenberg and Friedrick Koening (or Ukiyo-e Woodblock Printing) 
4	
2023/10/01─2023/10/07
	Convergence 	Steven Johnson and Nicholas Carr: How Does the Screen Affect Our Brains? 
5	
2023/10/08─2023/10/14
	Double Ten National Holiday (Make-up session on Sept.23) 	 
6	
2023/10/15─2023/10/21
	Cultural Periods 	How Did the Industrial Revolution(s) Shape the Cultural Period Known as the Modern Age? 
7	
2023/10/22─2023/10/28
	Mass Media and Popular Culture 	Gatekeepers and Tastemakers: Who Decides What We Relish and Detest?
(e.g. The Devil Wears Prada) 
8	
2023/10/29─2023/11/04
	Mass Media and Popular Culture 	 
9	
2023/11/05─2023/11/11
	Mid-term Exam (I) 	 
10	
2023/11/12─2023/11/18
	Media and Its Messages 	The Birth of Heroism: What Cultural Values are Delivered by Super Hero(in)es.
(e.g. DC, Marvel, etc.) 
11	
2023/11/19─2023/11/25
	Media Studies Controversies 	Violence and Sex? Video Games as an Effective Form of Media (e.g. Jack Thompson; Ready Player One) 
12	
2023/11/26─2023/12/02
	Books and the Development of U.S. Popular Culture 	Authors and Where to Find Them: What Social/Cultural Climate Gave Birth to Popular Writers?
(e.g. Diana Wynne Jones, Joanne Kathleen Rowling, Rick Riordan, Ernest Miller Hemingway, Stan Lee, Dan Brown, George R. R. Martin) 
13	
2023/12/03─2023/12/09
	Different Styles and Models of Journalism 	Differences between Objective Journalism and Literary / Narrative / New Journalism
(Into the Wild by Jon Krakauer) 
14	
2023/12/10─2023/12/16
	How Newspapers Control the Public's Access to Information and Impact American Pop Culture 	Watchdog Journalism: What Good Does Barking Dogs Do?
(Who holds the government/institutions/public officials/politicians accountable?) (e.g. The Wall Street Journal) 
15	
2023/12/17─2023/12/23
	Online Journalism Redefines News 	The Cost of Free Lunch: What Sacrifices Are Made When We Read News for Free? 
16	
2023/12/24─2023/12/30
	Wrapping up 	 
17	
2023/12/31─2024/01/06
	ROC Founding Day (Jan.1) 	 
18	
2024/01/07─2024/01/13
	Final Exam (I) 	 


6.成績評定及課堂要求
1. Mid-term exam 30% 2. Final exam 30% 3. Presentation, class participation and attendance 40%
